description_long: This is a medium-sized rectangular cardboard shipping box with a light brown, slightly worn exterior. The box features printed handling symbols, including 'FRAGILE' and recycling icons, as well as a barcode and a shipping label on the top surface. The box is partially open, with its top flaps folded outward, revealing an empty interior. The exterior is sealed with a strip of brown packing tape running along the top seam. The cardboard surface has a matte, fibrous texture, and the box appears sturdy enough for typical parcel delivery. This type of box is commonly found on sidewalks, in mailrooms, or near doorsteps in urban environments.
description: A light brown cardboard shipping box with printed labels and partially open flaps, showing an empty interior.
description_view_0: Front view showing the closed side of the box with handling symbols, barcode, and shipping label visible.
description_view_1: Side view with two top flaps open, revealing the interior and a recycling symbol printed on the side.
description_view_2: Top-down view highlighting all four flaps open and the empty box interior.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with two flaps open and the recycling symbol visible, showing the taped seam.
